observe.description: What you see on screen RIGHT NOW. Key elements, window titles, values, focus state. Produce at least 150 tokens.

reason.description: Why this action. Reference goal, next_step, and relevant elements. If retrying, explain what's different. Produce at least 150 tokens.

actions.description: Actions to execute in sequence: 'click <ID>', 'double_click <ID>', 'type <ID> <text>', 'replace <ID> <text>', 'press <keys>', or 'done'. Chain deterministic sequences. Execution stops at first failure or 'done'.

expect.description: Predicted screen state after execution. Be specific and falsifiable.

extended_observation_needed.description: True only if you need UI trees of windows not currently shown.

expand_data.description: Request full data for next cycle. ref: 'cycle_N_typed', 'element_ID_value', 'clipboard', 'run_history'. range: [start_pct, end_pct] 0-100. Data arrives next cycle in EXPANDED DATA section.

developer_feedback.description: Honest self-critique: what could go wrong, what's uncertain, what loops are you detecting. Produce at least 150 tokens.
